goal: Visit the public Hacker News front page and extract the latest visible market-relevant technology stories. Return only finance or technology market signals. For each article, extract title, summary, published timestamp when explicit or the page capture time when the page does not show a separate timestamp, article URL, signal type, market category, severity, mentioned companies when explicit, and explicit regions when explicit. Classify visible startup, AI, infrastructure, chip, software, and developer ecosystem stories as technology. Do not invent companies or regions that are not explicitly present on the page.
goal_prompt:
Visit the public Hacker News front page and extract the latest visible market-relevant technology stories. Return only finance or technology market signals. For each article, extract title, summary, published timestamp when explicit or the page capture time when the page does not show a separate timestamp, article URL, signal type, market category, severity, mentioned companies when explicit, and explicit regions when explicit. Classify visible startup, AI, infrastructure, chip, software, and developer ecosystem stories as technology. Do not invent companies or regions that are not explicitly present on the page.

Return only structured JSON that matches this schema exactly:
{"type":"object","required":["captured_at","articles","metrics","map_points"],"properties":{"captured_at":{"type":"string"},"articles":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["title","summary","published_at","article_url","signal_type","market_category","severity"],"properties":{"title":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"},"published_at":{"type":"string"},"article_url":{"type":"string"},"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"market_category":{"type":"string"},"severity":{"type":"string"},"companies":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"regions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}}},"metrics":{"type":"object","required":["story_count"],"properties":{"story_count":{"type":"number"}}},"map_points":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["latitude","longitude","entity_name","signal_type","severity","timestamp","explanation"],"properties":{"latitude":{"type":"number"},"longitude":{"type":"number"},"entity_name":{"type":"string"},"signal_type":{"type":"string"},"severity":{"type":"string"},"timestamp":{"type":"string"},"explanation":{"type":"string"},"cluster_key":{"type":"string"}}}}}}

Stop conditions:
["Stop after up to 20 visible articles are extracted.","Stop when the first page has been fully parsed and no new article cards remain.","Stop after two consecutive page parsing failures."]

Structured error handling rules:
{"timeout":{"action":"retry","max_retries":2,"emit_status":"failed"},"layout_changed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"failed"},"schema_validation_failed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"validation_error"}}
stop_conditions: Stop after up to 20 visible articles are extracted.
Stop when the first page has been fully parsed and no new article cards remain.
Stop after two consecutive page parsing failures.
